records.override_reason: Invoice $164,500 includes 2.5% annual escalation per contract C-2024-001 Year 2; ceiling should have been $164,000
records.pattern_identified: CCR ceiling check not accounting for contract price escalation clauses from CIA
records.proposed_adjustment: Feed escalation clause values from CIA into CCR ceiling calculation at decision time

records.override_reason: Filename 'invoice_Q1_final.pdf' matched suspicious pattern but is a legitimate naming convention for this supplier
records.pattern_identified: Supplier SUP-0072 always names invoices 'invoice_QN_final.pdf' — pattern is approved, not suspicious
records.proposed_adjustment: Add supplier-specific approved filename patterns to Learning Agent suppression list

records.override_reason: Duplicate submission was caused by a system retry after timeout — both rows identical; dedup resolves it automatically
records.pattern_identified: Exception agent escalated duplicate before checking if it was a system-generated retry vs genuine duplicate
records.proposed_adjustment: Add system-retry detection context to Exception Agent perception step before escalation decision

records.override_reason: Legal team extracted correct terms: Net45, price_escalation=3%, jurisdiction=Missouri
records.pattern_identified: CIA prompt did not instruct model to identify the governing clause when two clauses conflict — defaulted to first found
records.proposed_adjustment: Update CIA extraction prompt: add instruction to identify governing clause when conflicts exist; output both values with governance flag

records.override_reason: Supplier replied to generic team inbox instead of AP team; template reply-to address was wrong
records.pattern_identified: 3 of last 5 correction requests received replies to wrong inbox; template reply-to not supplier-specific
records.proposed_adjustment: Update TMPL-CORR-1ST to inject supplier-specific AP contact as reply-to; not just sender address

records.override_reason: Supplier notified Buyer in advance of delayed payment due to bank holiday — orchestrator had the note
records.pattern_identified: Cash Recon Agent did not check for pre-notified delay notes in SQL Server before classifying LATE_ANOMALY
records.proposed_adjustment: Add pre-notification check (supplier_delay_notice table in SQL Server) to historical_pattern_check node

records.override_reason: Same supplier, same amount structure approved 4 consecutive months without issue
records.pattern_identified: Supplier SUP-0104 has 6-month clean track record at >$500K; approval gate causing consistent 2-day delay
records.proposed_adjustment: Adjust SUP-0104 high-value threshold to $750K based on 6-month clean history — requires human approval of adjustment

records.override_reason: Operator approved manually to unblock critical shipment
records.pattern_identified: 2 cases where suspended supplier was approved manually — pattern suggests suspension is too broadly applied
records.proposed_adjustment: Remove SUPPLIER_SUSPENDED as automatic hard block; convert to soft flag requiring human confirmation

records.override_reason: Same supplier SUP-0053 has had completeness <50% for 3 consecutive months; pattern not previously flagged
records.pattern_identified: No pattern detection across months for same supplier repeatedly failing completeness; each treated as isolated event
records.proposed_adjustment: Add cross-period completeness failure counter to Learning Agent; if same supplier fails 3+ months, trigger contract review escalation

records.override_reason: Human confirmed this was a genuine duplicate; not a false positive
records.pattern_identified: One historical case where duplicate flag was raised incorrectly (split invoice); operator suggested reducing sensitivity
records.proposed_adjustment: Reduce duplicate payment detection sensitivity — allow same invoice_ref within 30 days if supplier confirms

records.override_reason: Human reviewed audit trail; CCR decision correct; clean transaction processed on time
records.pattern_identified: CCR PASS_THROUGH decisions for SUP-0014 have been 100% correct over 6 months — confidence well-calibrated
records.proposed_adjustment: No adjustment needed; reinforce current threshold for this supplier segment
